nasb.text: After that He appeared to more than five hundred brethren at one time, most of whom remain until now, but some have fallen asleep;

esv.text: Then he appeared to more than five hundred brothers at one time, most of whom are still alive, though some have fallen asleep.

cnv.text: 以後又有一次向五百多個弟兄顯現。他們中間大多數到現今還在，也有些已經睡了。

ccb.text: 后来有一次向五百多位弟兄姊妹显现，其中有许多至今依然健在，也有些已经安息了；

csbs.text: 后来一次性地向五百多个弟兄显现， 其中大多数人至今还在，虽然也有些已经睡了；
